_publications._publicationTitle: Increased extracellular matrix deposition during chondrogenic differentiation of dental pulp stem cells from individuals with neurofibromatosis type 1: an in vitro 2D and 3D study.

_contextSnippet: pellets were macroscopically similar in all cultures, showing a reduction in size during the second week of differentiation and maintaining the size stable until the end of the protocol
details: Pellets showed reduction in size during second week of differentiation and maintained stable size until protocol end, with successful chondrogenic differentiation confirmed by GAGs production
